role: Integrate TerrainSurface into match lifecycle (generation, spawn placement, crater updates).
Define TerrainSurface contract and extend MatchState/public state types.
Pure terrain generation module producing high-resolution heights, metrics, and spawn slots.
Encapsulate crater deformation logic with smooth falloff and metadata output.
Export terrain utilities (generator, crater, helpers) for simulation and tests.
Render high-resolution terrain and respond to terrain.version updates for smooth UX.
Capture performance metrics for terrain generation/updates and surface them via ledger events.
Validate terrain variation metrics and spawn slot stability for SCN-0301.
Assert crater smoothness/locality and deformation metadata for SCN-0303.
Exercise terrain generation and crater application against latency budgets for SCN-0304.
Extend replay hash coverage to include TerrainSurface.version and deformation history for SCN-0302.
Wire scenario verifiers to new terrain metadata and performance metrics for automated evidence capture.
